goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 09:30'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'stansted airport'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 09:30
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from stansted airport
Make sure you get train ID
